title: Talos pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow configuration parameters for the Talos pipeline.

input_tsv.description: Input runs as a TSV of `cohort`, `path`, and `type`

processed_annotations.description: Global output directories - should be changed for each deployment.

ref_genome.description: Reference genome, default is in large_files.

mane.description: MANE transcript resource, default is in large_files.

mane_json.description: Result file from running ParseManeIntoJson on the MANE summary file, default is in processed_annotations.

ensembl_gff.description: Ensembl gene feature file, default is in large_files.

ensembl_bed.description: Result files from the CreateRoiFromGff3 nextflow module, default is in processed_annotations.

ensembl_merged_bed.description: Result files (merged bed) from the CreateRoiFromGff3 nextflow module, default is in processed_annotations.

alphamissense_tsv.description: AlphaMissense raw data, default is in large_files.

alphamissense_zip.description: AlphaMissense reformatted as an echtvar-compatible zip, default is in processed_annotations.

submission_summary.description: ClinVar download URL for submission summary.

variant_summary.description: ClinVar download URL for variant summary.

hpo.description: HPO and Phenotype file, default is in large_files.

gen2phen.description: Genes to phenotype file, default is in large_files.

phenio_db.description: Phenio database, default is in large_files.

input_vcf_extension.description: Input VCF extension and location logic.

vcf_split_n.description: Number of lines to split VCFs by.

gnomad_zip.description: Echtvar-formatted annotation data for gnomAD, default is in large_files.
